TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ciupus, title = Ciupus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciupus} }

S.FORM: alang Ciupus ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 15 buwan, 35 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 35 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciupus hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ciupus hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciupus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ciupus hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciupus hya' ga Raysinay. tay 'zil na Ciupus hya' ga Sinpitu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ciupus ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 15 buwan, 35 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 35 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciupus hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ciupus hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciupus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ciupus hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciupus hya' ga Raysinay. tay 'zil na Ciupus hya' ga Sinpitu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiupus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa ***% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiupus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiupus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiupus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiupus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiupus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rajs~ɕinaj. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiupus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinpitu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
